div1.entryFree:
Unyoke, 1) to free from a yoke: like youthful steers --d, H4B IV, 2, 103. Absol.: ay, tell me that, and u. Hml. V, 1, 59 (== and then your day's work is done; German: dann kannst du ausspannen. The grave-digger's speech).
2) disjoin: shall these hands . . . u. this seizure, John III, 1, 241.
